meaning: n.昔日英国的四便士银币,些许,少许的金钱
examples: Her brother had gone by the name of Groat, though his true name had been Oppo.
Pin a Day is a Groat a Year.
Tis a well spent penny that saves a groat.
Charles Groat, Professor of Geosciences at the University, is an Independent Director of Plains Exploration.
Dr de Groat's device overcomes this by stimulating one particular nerve that is connected to the sphincter.
